citation.description: test_review_plan_unrelated_write_still_certifies asserts signature.signed is True when only an unrelated ticket is edited mid-review; PlanReviewGeneration has ticket_store_revision and relation_snapshot as compare=False (generation.py:39-40) so unrelated writes don't affect identity.

criteria.criterion: A review-plan PASS during which only UNRELATED store writes land ends certified with no manual step — verified by a unit/integration test that commits an unrelated ticket event between review start and sign.

citation.description: test_review_plan_own_material_change_names_the_change asserts signed is False and 'own' appears in the error message. generation.py:154-158 produces 'the reviewed ticket's own plan material changed since the review...' when own_material diverges.

criteria.criterion: A review-plan PASS during which the reviewed ticket's own material changes still fails closed, with a message naming the ticket-material change — verified by a companion test.

citation.description: CLI bifurcates: plan_review_generation_changed event → 'run `rebar review-plan`' (material stale, re-review needed); all other events → 'run `rebar sign-review {tid}`' (transient). Tests test_cli_material_change_requires_re_review (asserts 'review-plan' in msg and 'sign-review' not in msg) and test_cli_transient_points_to_sign_review (asserts 'rebar sign-review 790c-a7a3-120a-42c8' in msg) both verify the correct paths. Reframe of original AC is documented in ticket comment with explicit design ruling.

criteria.criterion: The residual unsigned-PASS message points to 'rebar sign-review <id>', not 're-review required' — verified by asserting the CLI output text (src/rebar/_cli/_llm_commands.py:121).

citation.description: Test file tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_plan_review_dependency_invalidation_790c.py contains 6 concrete tests with no skip/xfail markers. Ticket comment attests 'make lint + typecheck green; 880 passed in the plan-review/resign/attest sweep.' Implementation is complete (resign.py, generation.py, _llm_commands.py all have concrete non-stub code). Cannot execute the build directly, but no evidence of failures or stubs.

criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test green.
